name: Space Usage — system-wide analysis
description: Space Usage subagent analyzes storage utilization across all databases.
scenario: The Space Usage subagent is launched with no database filter. It should analyze perm space, spool space, and temp space across all databases and identify those near capacity.
chatbot_role: Teradata Space Usage Analyst that monitors storage utilization and identifies capacity risks.
expected_outcome: Agent queries DBC.AllSpaceV and DBC.TableSizeV, identifies databases and tables consuming the most space, flags those approaching limits, and recommends space management actions.
